title: Attendance and Engagement
summary: Simulate a classroom facial recognition workflow where faculty can upload either a class video feed or a classroom photo after class and review attendance records on the right.
uploadNote: Faculty can work from a class video feed after the session or from a single classroom image. Choose one sample below, then press Enter to reveal the detected roster.
examplesCaption: Use a video sample to show attendance and engagement together, or use a photo sample to show attendance only.
outputCaption: If the uploaded input is a video feed, the table includes engagement. If the uploaded input is only a photo, the engagement column is omitted.
